headline: U.S. Bets Billions of Dollars in Low-Cost Loans Can Revive Nuclear Power
summary: The Energy Department will let utilities tap government funds to kick-start reactor orders.

raw.headline: U.S. Bets Billions of Dollars in Low-Cost Loans Can Revive Nuclear Power
raw.summary: The Energy Department will let utilities tap government funds to kick-start reactor orders.

headline: Barclays Maintains Overweight on Dominion Energy, Lowers Price Target to $69
summary: Barclays  analyst Nicholas Campanella   maintains Dominion Energy (NYSE:D) with a Overweight and lowers the price target from $70 to $69.
